Your Vision.

A professional podcast, broadcast & reels production studio in New Cairo — built for creators, brands and businesses who want their story shot like it matters.

The Space

Five dressed sets.
One address.

Studio 93 isn't a bare white cyclorama. Every corner is styled — velvet, vintage optics, warm stone and a hand-built gallery wall — so your frame has character before the first light is switched on.

SET 01
The Light Room

Soft light, hard opinions.

A studio softbox on a warm stone wall and a deep tan lounge — the anchor corner for interviews and long-form conversations where the guest needs to sink in and forget the camera.

Interview setupSoftbox key lightStone backdrop
SET 02
The Green Room

Velvet and static.

Emerald velvet drapes, a retro television and a splash of colour on the wall. Cinematic depth for host reads, brand reveals and reels that need a pop of saturated personality.

Reels backdropVelvet textureRetro props
SET 03
The Archive

Analogue on purpose.

A cabinet of old broadcast — a CRT set, tungsten work-lights and layered newsprint. A story-rich table for product close-ups, unboxings and detail-driven B-roll.

Product tablePractical lightsTextured props
SET 04
The Detail Wall

Where the crop lives.

A hung vintage camera, a framed print, a shift in wall texture. Built for the tight, tactile shots — the transitions and inserts that make an edit feel expensive.

Insert shotsMacro friendlyVintage optics
SET 05
The Gallery Wall

A little bit of Egypt.

A curated wall of framed art over a low walnut console. A warm, lived-in editorial backdrop for two-shots, seated segments and cover frames with a sense of place.

Editorial two-shotWarm paletteLocal character
What We Shoot

Everything from mic to master.

Ten production services under one roof — record, film, edit and publish without ever changing address.

Inside The Studio

A room worth framing.

How It Works

Four steps, start to publish.

Step 01

Book

Pick a set and a slot. We lock the brief, the look and the shot list before you arrive.

Step 02

Record

Lights up, mics live. Our team runs the room so you focus only on the performance.

Step 03

Edit

Colour, sound and cut — long-form masters and vertical reels built from the same day.

Step 04

Publish

Delivered ready for every platform, framed and sized to go straight to your audience.
